Class DashboardUI

java.lang.Object
UI.DashboardUI
public class DashboardUI extends Object
Handles the main dashboard interface for logged-in users.

Serves as the central hub to navigate to transactions, budgets, goals, reports, profiles, notifications, and exports.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DashboardUI(Scanner scanner, User currentUser)
    Constructs a new DashboardUI for a specific user.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    checkThreshold()
    Checks all budgets for threshold breaches.
    void
    displayDashboard()
    Displays the dashboard summary (balance, recents, warnings, goals).
    void
    loadRecentTransactions()
    Loads recent transactions for the dashboard view.
    void
    refreshData()
    Refreshes dashboard data and triggers background checks.
    void
    showBudgetWarning()
    Checks and displays any budget warnings (spent >= 80% limit).
    void
    showGoalsSummary()
    Displays a summary of the user's financial goals.
    void
    start()
    Starts the dashboard session, displaying the main menu loop.

  • Constructor Details

    • DashboardUI

      public DashboardUI(Scanner scanner, User currentUser)
      Constructs a new DashboardUI for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      scanner - the scanner for console input
      currentUser - the currently logged-in user

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start()
      Starts the dashboard session, displaying the main menu loop.

    • refreshData

      public void refreshData()
      Refreshes dashboard data and triggers background checks.

    • loadRecentTransactions

      public void loadRecentTransactions()
      Loads recent transactions for the dashboard view.

    • checkThreshold

      public void checkThreshold()
      Checks all budgets for threshold breaches.

    • displayDashboard

      public void displayDashboard()
      Displays the dashboard summary (balance, recents, warnings, goals).

    • showBudgetWarning

      public void showBudgetWarning()
      Checks and displays any budget warnings (spent >= 80% limit).

    • showGoalsSummary

      public void showGoalsSummary()
      Displays a summary of the user's financial goals.
